'''jokashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabotted|sabotted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabotted|sabotted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jokashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jokashithi|jokashithi]] || [[word:jokashiji|jokashiji]] || [[word:jokashishi|jokashishi]] || [[word:jokashiki|jokashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jokashuthuthu|jokashuthuthu]] || [[word:jokashujuju|jokashujuju]] || [[word:jokashushushu|jokashushushu]] || [[word:jokashukuku|jokashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jokashuthu|jokashuthu]] || [[word:jokashuju|jokashuju]] || [[word:jokashushu|jokashushu]] || [[word:jokashuku|jokashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jokashufthuf|jokashufthuf]] || [[word:jokashufjuf|jokashufjuf]] || [[word:jokashufshuf|jokashufshuf]] || [[word:jokashufkuf|jokashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jokashethe|jokashethe]] || [[word:jokasheje|jokasheje]] || [[word:jokasheshe|jokasheshe]] || [[word:jokasheke|jokasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jokashothotho|jokashothotho]] || [[word:jokashojojo|jokashojojo]] || [[word:jokashoshosho|jokashoshosho]] || [[word:jokashokoko|jokashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jokashotho|jokashotho]] || [[word:jokashojo|jokashojo]] || [[word:jokashosho|jokashosho]] || [[word:jokashoko|jokashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jokashofthof|jokashofthof]] || [[word:jokashofjof|jokashofjof]] || [[word:jokashofshof|jokashofshof]] || [[word:jokashofkof|jokashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfthĂŻf|jokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfjĂŻf|jokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfshĂŻf|jokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfkĂŻf|jokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jokashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jokashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jokashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jokashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfthĂŻf|jokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfjĂŻf|jokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfshĂŻf|jokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfkĂŻf|jokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfthĂŻf|jokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfjĂŻf|jokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfshĂŻf|jokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jokashĂŻfkĂŻf|jokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jokashĂŠthĂŠ|jokashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jokashĂŠjĂŠ|jokashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jokashĂŠshĂŠ|jokashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jokashĂŠkĂŠ|jokashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jokashathatha|jokashathatha]] || [[word:jokashajaja|jokashajaja]] || [[word:jokashashasha|jokashashasha]] || [[word:jokashakaka|jokashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jokashatha|jokashatha]] || [[word:jokashaja|jokashaja]] || [[word:jokashasha|jokashasha]] || [[word:jokashaka|jokashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jokashafthaf|jokashafthaf]] || [[word:jokashafjaf|jokashafjaf]] || [[word:jokashafshaf|jokashafshaf]] || [[word:jokashafkaf|jokashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jokashasha|jokashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jokashĂ«sha|jokashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jokashrosha|jokashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jokashmusha|jokashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jokashyasha|jokashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojokashnkshĂ«sha|gojokashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojokashnkrosha|gojokashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojokashnkmusha|gojokashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojokashnkyasha|gojokashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jokakashasha|jokakashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jokakashĂ«sha|jokakashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jokakashrosha|jokakashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jokakashmusha|jokakashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jokakashyasha|jokakashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojokakashnkshĂ«sha|gojokakashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojokakashnkrosha|gojokakashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojokakashnkmusha|gojokakashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojokakashnkyasha|gojokakashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jekĂŠshasha|jekĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jekĂŠshĂ«sha|jekĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jekĂŠshrosha|jekĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jekĂŠshmusha|jekĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jekĂŠshyasha|jekĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojekĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gojekĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojekĂŠshnkrosha|gojekĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojekĂŠshnkmusha|gojekĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojekĂŠshnkyasha|gojekĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jokfashasha|jokfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jokfashĂ«sha|jokfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jokfashrosha|jokfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jokfashmusha|jokfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jokfashyasha|jokfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojokfashnkshĂ«sha|gojokfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojokfashnkrosha|gojokfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojokfashnkmusha|gojokfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojokfashnkyasha|gojokfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
